case_title: NADESSA COREA-LEVY VS. NIKKI PAPPAS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COREA-LEVY, NADESSA AS TO DEFENDANT PAPPAS, NIKKI DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-23-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-08-2013

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-04-2014. THE JUL-08-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-06-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-08-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-06-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR CLIFFORD STUART WEINGUS APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-05-2014 THROUGH NOV-03-2014.
